TRIGGER (b) FIRED — projected deployment crossed 75%. Per 14:00 flag: 'if projected deployment climbs past ~73-75%, add max_deployed_pct = 0.75 override as a hard ceiling ahead of the 80% base cap'. Power cluster on full fill: TORNTPOWER 5.94% (filled) + NTPC 5.06% (pending) + ADANIPOWER 4.92% (pending) = 15.92% of capital, three names. NEW PATTERN — FMCG now a 2-name cluster. Active overrides entering this tick: min_confidence = 0.60 (risk_monitor, 13:00), max_position_pct = 0.15 (risk_monitor, 12:30). After this tick's action: add max_deployed_pct = 0.75 override.

Risk level HIGH (up from MEDIUM at 14:00, 13:30, 13:00). Escalation drivers: (1) two of the four explicit 14:00 trigger conditions fired in a single 30-min window; (2) projected deployment jumped from 11-pp-headroom to 1.44-pp-headroom vs base cap; (3) two new sector clusters (FMCG, Power) are now visible alongside the BFSI-dominant profile; (4) the multi-lot single-name stacking pattern (first seen on AUBANK) has recurred on NESTLEIND, suggesting the behavior is structural rather than one-off. Not CRITICAL because (a) no realized loss, (b) no per-name cap breach from post-cap orders, (c) cash headroom is still material at ~₹2.14L on full fill, (d) max_position_pct continues to bind. The 0.75 deployment override brings the appropriate brake on further admissions this session.
actions_taken: Tightened max_deployed_pct from 0.80 (base) to 0.75 via override. Rationale: executing the explicit 14:00 trigger plan that specified 'if projected deployment climbs past ~73-75%, add max_deployed_pct = 0.75 override'. Projected full-fill deployment this tick is 78.56% — already past the trigger band and 1.44 pp from the 80% base cap. Setting the override below the current projected full-fill (0.75 < 0.7856) hard-pauses admission of any NEW entry while grandfathering the five in-flight OPEN orders (consistent with the non-punitive pattern of the 12:30 and 13:00 overrides — no order cancellations). Once pending fills land, any later reassessment reopens capacity only by whatever margin remains under 0.75.

Subsumed cluster-aware response for the emerging Power cluster into the single max_deployed_pct lever. With the deployment cap now below current projected full-fill, no sector can acquire a 4th name (Power: TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER is 3; FMCG: NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR is 2; both blocked from expansion until fills free capacity). A dedicated cluster-concentration parameter does not exist in the config, and stacking a second lever on this tick (e.g. lowering max_position_pct further, raising min_confidence, or raising min_risk_reward) would over-constrain when the deployment cap alone closes the admission door.

Retained min_confidence = 0.60 (set 13:00). Lever is still biting: only ~1 new OPEN order per 30-min tick at 13:30 and 14:00, stepping up to 2 new entries (1 filled, 1 OPEN) this 14:00→14:30 window. Confidence gate remains a binding qualification bar and there is no evidence that signal quality is the live risk vector.

Retained max_position_pct = 0.15 (set 12:30). AUBANK structural breach (18.46% full-fill, pre-cap OPEN orders) persists and is self-limiting — cap blocks further AUBANK adds. NESTLEIND aggregate at 12.01% full-fill is inside cap. Trigger (c) for further max_position_pct tightening to 0.12 did not fire (BFSI did not re-inflect).

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03), drawdown_reduce_pct (0.10), or drawdown_halt_pct (0.15). Realized P&L remains ₹0, no unrealized-loss data observable, drawdown has not materialized. Loss/drawdown gates with zero-loss conditions would be noise adjustments.

Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct (0.02), min_sl_pct (0.005), max_sl_pct (0.05), or min_risk_reward (1.5). Exit-mechanics and R:R-quality axes are uncorrelated with the live risk vectors (concentration + deployment velocity) — the 14:00 rejection rationale still holds.

Flagged for next tick (15:00): (a) if filled deployment climbs above 0.75 via OPEN-book fills, any residual admission capacity closes and system will self-reject all new entries until a sell or drawdown frees room — verify this behaves as intended; (b) if a 3rd FMCG name is attempted (turning FMCG into a 3-name cluster matching Power), treat as parity trigger to Power's emergence and reassess whether a dedicated cluster-level brake is needed; (c) if any filled position shows a meaningful unrealized loss once live quotes reattach, re-run loss-gate exposure; (d) if projected deployment drops back below 0.75 because an OPEN order is withdrawn/rejected rather than filled, consider whether the 0.75 override was premature and should be relaxed — but only on explicit mechanical evidence (order rejection), not price drift.
